doc_title: MedusA: Simple LLM Inference Acceleration Framework with Multiple Decoding Heads

items.evidence_span: subsequent implementations [Joao Gante, 2023, Spector and Re, 2023]
subsequent implementations [Joao Gante, 2023, Spector and Re, 2023]
This approach draws inspiration from truncation sampling studies [Hewitt et al. 2022]
using the ShareGPT [ShareGPT, 2023] dataset for chat models
similar to classic knowledge distillation works [Kim and Rush, 2016]
We can use a parameterefficient adapter like LoRA [Hu et al. 2021]
